CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2016 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On The Applicability Of The San Francisco Rent Ordinance
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stanley Shen, Esq. (415-661-6700) for Plaintiff/Moving party GUI ZHOU, DONG HUANG, WEI WU, YU XIE, BEN WU.
Vadim Sidelnikov, Esq. (415-981-5411) for Defendant/opposing party Matthew Wai Ma.

Plaintiff submits a reply prior to the hearing. The Court does not consider the untimely pleading. Both sides ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF GUI ZHOU, DONG HUANG, WEI WU, YU XIE, BEN WU's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On The Applicability Of The San Francisco Rent Ordinance is DENIED. The issue proposed for adjudication does not completely dispose of a cause of action, affirmative defense, a claim for damages or an issue of duty. CCP 437c(f).Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Newton J. Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION On The Applicability Of The San Francisco Rent Ordinance

Judge: Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported
